zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Tattershall IV於大約1222年12月5日出生在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆時，他的父親Robert de Tattershall25歲，母親Matilda d'Aubigny25歲。他和Nichola至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1273年7月22日在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tattershall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tattersall
meanings: English (Lancashire and west Yorkshire): habitational name from Tattershall in Lincolnshire, named from the Old English personal name Tāthere (genitive Tātheres) + Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Tattershall IV was born about 5 December 1222, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert de Tattershall, was 25 and his mother, Matilda d'Aubigny, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Nichola. He died on 22 July 1273, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Tattershall IV est né environ 5 décembre 1222, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Tattershall, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda d'Aubigny, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Nichola. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1273, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Tattershall IV um 5. Dezember 1222 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Tattershall 25 und seine Mutter Matilda d'Aubigny 25. Er hatte mit Nichola mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Juli 1273 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Tattershall IV è nato il circa 5 dicembre 1222 nel Buckenham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert de Tattershall, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Matilda d'Aubigny, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Nichola. Morì il 22 luglio 1273, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Tattershall IVが約1222年12月5日にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで生まれた時，父Robert de Tattershallは25歳，母Matilda d'Aubignyは25歳であった。彼はNicholaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1273年7月22日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで50歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Tattershall IV(이)가 대략 1222년 12월 5일 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Tattershall(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda d'Aubigny(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Nichola(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 7월 22일 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 타터샤에 묻혔다.

pt.about 5 December 1222–22 July 1273: aproximadamente 5 de dezembro de 1222–22 de julho de 1273
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Tattershall IV nasceu aproximadamente 5 de dezembro de 1222, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Tattershall, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Matilda d'Aubigny, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Nichola. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1273, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Tattershall IV родился около 5 декабря 1222 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Tattershall было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda d'Aubigny, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Nichola. Он умер 22 июля 1273 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия.
